calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Andrew R. Bendon, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caterpillar Financial Services Corporation, a Delaware corporation.
No appearance by defendant Maureen O'Neill.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on September 4, 2008.
Dismissal as to defendants Martha O'Neill Feely, an individual, Avoca Trucking and Excavating, Inc., a California Corporation, Avoca Trucking & Excavating, Inc., a California Corporation and Does 1 through 50, inclusive, was filed today, October 21, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 26, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Caterpillar Financial Services Corporation, a Delaware corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Maureen O'Neill as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,119.05.
Prejudgment Interest - $853.24.
Attorney's Fees - $1,550.00.
Costs - $697.63, for a total judgment in the amount of $15,219.92.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
